meta.title: Social Battery Test | What's Your Social Energy? - DopaBrain
meta.description: Measure your social battery level with 10 questions. Discover your social energy type, ideal social-to-alone ratio, and recharge methods.

app.title: Social Battery Test
app.subtitle: Social Battery Test
app.heroDesc: 10 questions to discover your social energy level and type.

intro.disclaimer: ⚠️ This test is for fun and is not a clinical diagnosis.

q1.text: You're at a party and having a great time. How long before you want to leave?

options.a: I could stay all night! My energy just keeps going
options.c: 1-2 hours is plenty, then I'm ready to slip out
options.d: 30 minutes max... honestly I was tired before I arrived

q2.text: Your friend cancels plans last minute. Your honest reaction?

options.a: Bummed! I immediately text someone else to hang out
options.b: A bit disappointed, but we'll meet another time
options.c: Secretly relieved while enjoying my sudden free time
options.d: Internal celebration! Unexpected alone time is the best gift

q3.text: After a full day of meetings, you...

options.a: Call friends to vent and recharge through socializing
options.b: A casual dinner with someone sounds nice
options.c: Head straight home for some quiet time
options.d: Turn off all notifications and become invisible

options.a: Packed with friends, parties, and outdoor activities
options.b: One day social, one day relaxing at home
options.c: Mostly alone with maybe one short meetup

q5.text: The group chat is blowing up with messages. You...

options.a: Jump right in and keep the conversation going
options.c: Read silently, only reply when directly asked
options.d: Mute it and check later... maybe tomorrow

q6.text: You're invited to a networking event full of strangers.

options.a: Exciting! A chance to meet new people
options.b: I'd go if a friend comes with me
options.c: I'll show up out of obligation but leave early
options.d: Politely decline and stay home, thanks

q7.text: You're working at a cafe and spot someone you know.

options.a: Invite them over for a long, fun chat
options.b: Say a quick hello and have a brief chat
options.c: Give a short wave and get back to work
options.d: Hide behind my laptop before they notice me

q8.text: You're going on a week-long trip. Who do you bring?

options.a: A whole group of friends — the more the merrier!
options.b: One or two close friends is perfect
options.c: Solo, but open to meeting locals
options.d: Completely alone with my own schedule and freedom

q9.text: When your energy is totally drained, the best recharge is...

options.a: Going out with my favorite people
options.b: A cozy hangout with a small group
options.d: Doing absolutely nothing in complete silence

q10.text: How much 'reset time' do you need after social activities?

options.a: Almost none — I'm ready for the next thing!
options.b: A few hours and I'm good to go
options.c: I need a full day to myself
options.d: Several days of alone time to fully recover

solarPanel.name: ☀️ Solar Panel
solarPanel.desc: You're a social powerhouse that charges up around people! Conversations and gatherings are your fuel — being alone actually drains you.
solarPanel.recharge: Lively conversations with friends, parties, group activities, meeting new people

rechargeable.name: 🔋 Rechargeable Battery
rechargeable.desc: You strike the perfect balance between social time and alone time! You flexibly manage your energy based on the situation.
rechargeable.recharge: Small gatherings, deep talks with close friends, café time, light outdoor activities

energySaver.name: 🔌 Energy Saver
energySaver.desc: An efficient introvert who wisely manages their energy! You prefer deep connections with a few people and truly recharge in solitude.
energySaver.recharge: Reading, solo walks, listening to music, hobbies, resting in quiet spaces

emergency.name: 🪫 Emergency Mode
emergency.desc: An ultra-sensitive energy detector! Social situations drain your battery fast, and deep, meaningful alone time is absolutely essential.
emergency.recharge: Complete silence, nature walks, meditation, creative activities, digital detox

share.twitterText: My social battery is at {percent}%! Type: {type} 🔋 What's your social battery?
